title: Tapping for perfect partnerships and clients
subtitle: A tapping practice for clearing the fear of mismatched connections and misaligned work.
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 46 of the MONEY program. The script works with the pattern of saying yes to the wrong fit out of fear there won't be a better one.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you're about to take on a project, client, or partnership that doesn't feel right but feels like the only option.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 46 of the MONEY program. The script targets the pattern of settling for misaligned clients or partnerships — taking what's available because trusting that better-fit ones are coming feels too risky.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I've worried about finding the right people to work with, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I fear mismatched partners or clients, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've felt pressure to say yes to the wrong fit, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I've taken on work that wasn't aligned.
**Side of eye:** I've settled for less than ideal.
**Under eye:** I've doubted that perfect matches exist.
**Under nose:** I've worried about trust and timing.
**Chin:** I sometimes ignore my intuition.
**Collarbone:** I want easy, high-value connections.
**Under arm:** I'm ready to welcome perfect partners.
**Top of head:** I invite aligned clients and deals.
Reframe to positive (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** The right people find me easily.
**Side of eye:** I attract clients who value my work.
**Under eye:** Partnerships feel smooth and profitable.
**Under nose:** We grow wealth together with ease.
**Chin:** I trust the timing of every connection.
**Collarbone:** I feel supported by a powerful network.
**Under arm:** I enjoy working only with ideal matches.
**Top of head:** I welcome perfect partners and clients now.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
Adapted from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). EFT tapping developed by Gary Craig in the 1990s.
